---
title: "About"
---

This site is hosted on GitHub Pages and is linked from my academic page.

- Contact: [racinej@mcmaster.ca](mailto:racinej@mcmaster.ca)
- Academic site: [experts.mcmaster.ca/display/racinej](https://experts.mcmaster.ca/display/racinej)
- Additional materials: [jeffreyracine.github.io/research](https://jeffreyracine.github.io/research)

The purpose of the gallery is practical: help users find the right package, see a small working example quickly, and then move to fuller documentation only when needed.
